title: Shoomf Pack
description: Vanilla + personal Modpack made for my wife to play with better food, animals, terrain, and performance.
body:
# Shoomf Pack

## Description:
An optimization, aesthetic, vanilla+ Modpack that I put together for wife to play for a singleplayer world.

Contains features such as better terrain generation, food and cooking, decoration, specifically formatted shaders and additional animals.

## Special Credits: 
(Thank you)
### Mods
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Mr. Crayfish Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)
- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
- [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
- [Ecliptic Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecliptic-seasons)
- [Swaying Garden](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/swaying-garden)
- [Super Better Grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
- [Chunk Sending](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-sending-forge-fabric)
### Misc
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
